@AlphaBull_10M consulted Claude Fable (1/5): 
 
Phase 1 — Compute (2023–24, mature): 
1. $NVDA — the genesis; ~90% of accelerator spend 
2. $TSM — manufactures every leading-edge AI chip, plus the CoWoS packaging bottleneck 
3. AVGO — custom ASICs (Google TPU, Meta, ByteDance) and networking silicon 
4. $AMD — the credible second source in GPUs 
5. ASML — the EUV monopoly beneath all of it 
 
Phase 2 — Neoclouds & deployment (2024–25, mature): 
1. $CRWV — the pure-play; $66B+ contracted backlog, guiding ~140% growth in 2026 
2. ORCL — the hyperscaler-adjacent winner via OCI and Stargate 
3. $NBIS — the international neocloud pure-play 
4. DELL — AI server integration at scale 
5. CLS — hyperscaler rack integration, Google TPU board/rack assembly, and the shift to liquid-cooled rack economics
